passkey_delete_error: Couldn't delete that passkey. Try again.
home_eggs_description: Orchard-raised hens, fed on ginger and herbs and never rushed — eggs gathered by hand every morning. They even come running to a bell at feeding time.
home_veggies_description: Just kangkung for now, with more greens to come as the soil's ready.
home_fruits_description: Durian, papaya and java apple — we treat every tree as its own living thing. One ripens this week, another the next; we never harvest the whole orchard at once, and the durians especially we let arrive in their own time.
home_eggs_price: RM30 per box of 15 — that's RM2 an egg.
home_eggs_order_message: Hi Our Little Farm! I'd like to order {boxes} boxes of eggs ({total} eggs in total).
home_feed_teaser: See what the animals are saying
home_story_heading: From our soil to your table
home_story_body_1: Our Little Farm isn't a poultry shed, and it never will be. Our hens live out in the orchard, under the fruit trees. What began with a few birds and a stretch of red Mantin earth has grown into something closer to an ecosystem than a farm — the chickens feed the soil, the soil feeds the trees, and the trees feed us.
home_story_body_2: The idea hasn't changed: love the land, and it loves you back. We've watched tired, lifeless ground turn rich and fertile under that one simple promise.
home_story_body_3: No shortcuts, no rushing the seasons — just honest food, grown the slow way, by people who'd happily share a pot of tea with you at the gate.
home_promise_heading: Grown the way it should be
home_promise_1_body: Low-stress birds raised on ginger, turmeric, garlic and herbs, with a calm daily routine and a lot of attention. Welfare first, always.
home_promise_2_body: We listen to each tree and harvest only what's truly ready — never the whole orchard at once.
home_promise_3_body: The chickens feed the soil, the soil feeds the trees. Nothing here goes to waste.
home_yolk_heading: You can see it in the yolk
home_yolk_intro: Cut one of our eggs in half and the difference is right there — deeper, richer, fresher than anything off a shelf.
home_yolk_shell_body: Gathered by hand every morning, never tumbled down a factory line.
home_yolk_white_body: Days-fresh, not months — a thick white that holds its shape in the pan.
home_yolk_yolk_body: Hens roam the orchard on ginger, turmeric and greens — that's where the sunset colour comes from.
home_visit_body: You'll find us down a quiet lane in Mantin, Negeri Sembilan. Mornings are best — the eggs are still warm and the kettle's usually on. Bring a basket. Our hens, geese and ducks are a friendly bunch.
home_latest_empty: The coop's quiet right now — be the first to make some noise.
home_faq_a1: RM30 per box of 15 — that's RM2 an egg.
home_faq_a2: Every Thursday. We'll sort out the timing with you on WhatsApp.
home_faq_a3: Tap “Order on WhatsApp”, choose how many boxes, and we'll take it from there.
home_faq_a4: Around Mantin and nearby — Kuala Lumpur, Selangor and Negeri Sembilan. Ask on WhatsApp about your area.
home_faq_q5: Do you sell anything besides eggs?
home_faq_a5: Seasonal vegetables and tree-ripened fruit, whenever they're ready.
footer_tagline: Farm community & egg store — location-bound reviews and posts.
posts_op_tooltip: Posted by an Our Little Farm owner
posts_comments_empty: No comments yet — start the conversation.
posts_empty: The coop's quiet here — nothing to show yet.
posts_load_error: Couldn't load the farm. Try again.
posts_new_loc_approx: Approximate location (the farm) — allow location to pin it exactly.
posts_new_geo_unsupported: Your browser can't share a location, which posts need.
posts_new_geo_denied: Posts are location-anchored — allow location access to post.
posts_new_geo_unavailable: Couldn't get your location. If you're on a Mac, turn on System Settings → Privacy & Security → Location Services for your browser, then try again.
posts_new_geo_timeout: Locating timed out. Check your connection and try again.
posts_new_flagged: Flagged by moderation: {reason}. Edit and try again.
signup_subtitle: See what users are saying in your neighbourhood
signup_username_instructions: Letters, numbers, and underscores. No spaces.
signup_meet_subtitle: Don't like it? Reroll a new one — this cannot be changed later.
subscribe_page_lead: Fresh eggs on your doorstep, every week. RM2 an egg — pick a flock size.
subscribe_modal_subtitle: Pick a tier — we sort the rest over WhatsApp.
subscribe_whatsapp_message: Hi Our Little Farm! I'd like to subscribe to the {name} plan ({price}).
subscribe_manual_note: Subscriptions are arranged over WhatsApp — no card needed.
subscribe_founder_tooltip: Founding flock — one of our first subscribers
subscribe_request_day_message: Hi Our Little Farm! I'd like to change my egg delivery day.
